questions.question: The author says Jesus is worthy of more glory than whom?
questions.feedback: Jesus has been counted worthy of more glory than Moses.

questions.question: The author warns against having what kind of heart that turns away from God?
questions.feedback: Take care that none of you has a sinful, unbelieving heart that turns away from God.

questions.question: Moses was faithful as a servant in God's house.
questions.feedback: Moses was faithful as a servant in all God's house.

questions.question: The Israelites in the wilderness could not enter God's rest because of their _____.
questions.feedback: They were unable to enter because of unbelief.

questions.question: The author says to encourage one another daily so none of you may be hardened by sin's _____.
questions.feedback: Encourage one another so that none is hardened by the deceitfulness of sin.
